lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, including some light scratches. The interior is well-maintained with minimal signs of use. All mechanical systems and electronics are functioning as expected.

This vehicle is in fair condition and offers a functional driving experience for those looking for an affordable option. The exterior shows its age with visible paint oxidation on the roof and hood, along with several noticeable scratches and minor dings around the body. Inside, the upholstery has some staining and a small tear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the car is operational, though it would benefit from a tune-up and new tires in the near future. The air conditioning and basic electronics are working, but the high mileage is reflected in the overall wear and tear. It is a solid choice for someone willing to put in a bit of cosmetic work.
Fair condition.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that's ready for more adventures? This car is in fair condition and has been well-used over the years, showing some honest wear and tear that adds to its character. It’s a solid, functional choice that still has plenty of life left in it, perfect for someone looking for value and reliability at a great price!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained over the years. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small scuff on the driver-side mirror. Inside, the upholstery is clean and free of tears, though the driver’s seat shows some light wear from regular use. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid; it starts reliably, shifts smoothly, and has a consistent service history. It’s a dependable choice for anyone looking for a well-kept vehicle that is ready for the road.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance, reliability, and refined aesthetics. This unit demonstrates consistent care and remains in commendable mechanical and cosmetic order, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term value. Having undergone a thorough multi-point inspection, this vehicle is prepared for immediate delivery and promises a sophisticated driving experience.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways! I've kept up with maintenance, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth.

Presenting a meticulously maintained premium SUV that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a well-loved vehicle. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, non-smoker cabin featuring supple leather seating, dual-zone climate control, and an intuitive infotainment system that functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is robust; it has been serviced regularly, offering a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers a quiet, confident ride. The tires are in excellent shape with significant tread remaining, and all safety features and electronic assists are fully operational. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle perfect for anyone seeking quality and comfort without the new-car price tag.

This distinguished vehicle offers an exceptional balance of performance and value. Characterized by a comprehensive maintenance history and a well-preserved interior, it remains in commendable condition for the discerning owner. Its mechanical integrity and refined road presence ensure a superior driving experience, representing a sophisticated acquisition for those prioritizing both reliability and prestige.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a balance of sophistication and proven longevity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and still looks sharp on the road! It's been well-loved and is totally ready for its next adventure. Come check it out—you’re going to love how it handles!

This 996-generation 911 Carrera features the M96 3.4L flat-six engine with optimized Variocam timing, delivering linear power delivery across the rev range. The G96 6-speed manual transaxle provides precise gear engagement, paired with a rear-wheel-drive configuration for ideal chassis balance. This example has received a verified IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh rear main seal to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. The suspension maintains factory kinematics for sharp turn-in, while the four-piston monoblock calipers provide consistent thermal management during spirited driving. A mechanically sound, driver-focused machine with honest cosmetic patina.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, superficial stone chips one would expect from careful road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and well-preserved; the premium upholstery is free of tears or stains, and all interior surfaces have been kept in a smoke-free environment. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced at regular intervals. All electronic components, including the dual-zone climate control, navigation system, and premium audio, are fully functional. The tires have significant tread life remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a solid, honest car that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a gem. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and weekend trips. I’ve taken great care of it, so it looks wonderful and drives even better! If you’re looking for a dependable car that still feels fresh and fun, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 represents a prime example of the high-revving S54 platform, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is mated to a precise ZF 6-speed manual transmission, delivering drive through a factory variable M differential lock. Mechanical integrity is prioritized with reinforced rear subframe mounting points and a recently refreshed cooling system. The suspension architecture retains its communicative feedback via MacPherson struts and multi-link rear geometry, supported by upgraded dampers. While displaying minor cosmetic signs of use, the engine pulls strongly through the entire rev range with a linear torque curve. This is a mechanically sorted driver's car optimized for performance-oriented ownership.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smoothly. Clean title.

Mechanically, it has been serviced religiously; the engine runs smooth and the gear transitions are seamless. It comes with a complete maintenance history, tires with excellent tread remaining, and a clear title. This is an ideal choice for a discerning driver seeking a high-end experience and dependable performance without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and daily usability, having been meticulously cared for by an enthusiast owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, complemented by clean lines and well-preserved trim, though a discerning eye might find a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with highway miles. Inside, the cabin remains a premium environment; the leather is supple and free of any significant wear or tears, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is robust and dependable, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. It drives straight and true, offering a smooth yet engaging experience. This is a clean, honest, and reliable example that is ready to be driven and enjoyed immediately.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, balancing superior mechanical integrity with a well-preserved aesthetic. Representing a premier selection for the discerning motorist, it provides an exceptional synthesis of performance and long-term value. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure lasting reliability and comfort.
